subject: 8-token palette + status colors mapped to the e2m task_state enum

pass_if: exactly 8 design tokens defined with hex + semantic name
each task_state (pending/in_progress/done/blocked) maps to a distinct token with documented contrast ratio >= 4.5:1
tokens emitted as CSS custom properties consumable by plan.subagentknowledge.com
fail_if: any task_state unmapped or sharing a color

subject: Figma dev-mode component set for the KAN completion board with handoff specs

pass_if: dev-mode component set covers card, column, and status-badge for all 4 task_states
each component has handoff specs (spacing, type, token refs) readable via Figma dev-mode-mcp
components reference the 8-token system not hardcoded hex
fail_if: any task_state missing a status-badge variant
hardcoded colors instead of token refs

pass_if: layout renders the KAN completion board responsively at mobile/tablet/desktop breakpoints
completion progress is visible above the fold on all breakpoints
layout composes the dev-mode components and 8-token palette from outcomes a/b
fail_if: horizontal scroll or clipped columns at any breakpoint
progress hidden below the fold on mobile
layout introduces off-system colors or components
